Lakeside Fictional Bank offers the Lakeside Business Builder Card for business applicants.
Earn a $500 cash bonus after $5,000 in business purchases within 90 days of account opening.
Annual fee is $0 for the first year and $125 after the first anniversary.
The card displays the Mastercard network.
Offer is public and ends January 31, 2027.
Applicant must use the card for business purposes; sole proprietors may apply.
